title: 20cm Round Candle Plate Candlestick Holders, Transparent Clear Glass Candle Stand Pillar Candle Holder for Home Décor, Dining Room Tabletop Centrepieces
features: Raised Safety Rim — Protective elevated edge stops dripping wax overflowing onto your furniture.
Spacious Size — External diameter 19.5 cm, internal diameter 16 cm: ideal for candles ≤ 16 cm, including pillar and wide jar candles.
Stylish & Practical — Sleek design enhances your décor while keeping surfaces safe from heat and wax stains.
Easy to Clean — Smooth finish allows wax to peel off or be wiped away easily; rinse with warm soapy water.
Stable & Durable — Solid build prevents tipping or sliding; suitable as a base for candles in frequent use.
description: Enhance your candle display while protecting your surfaces with this smart Candle Base / Wax Catcher. Designed with an outer rim to contain wax drips and an inner cavity sized perfectly for candles up to 16 cm diameter, it blends safety and style. With an external diameter of 19.5 cm including the raised rim, it gives enough buffer space to catch wax overflow, helping keep your tabletops, mantelpieces or sideboards clean. The inner space of 16 cm holds candles securely, ensuring they sit well without sliding off. This candle plate is ideal for pillar candles, jar candles, and large festive/scented candles. The raised rim means you can enjoy your favourite candles without worrying about wax mess—no more wax pools or burn marks. Offers a decorative touch in living rooms, bedrooms, dining rooms, or for special occasions. It’s durable, quick to wipe down, and safe to use — perfect for anyone who loves candles but wants a cleaner, safer experience.
